title: Don't Think I've Forgotten: Cambodia's Lost Rock and Roll
original_title: Don't Think I've Forgotten: Cambodia's Lost Rock and Roll
overview: Through the eyes, words and songs of its popular music stars of the 50s, 60s, and 70s, Don't Think I've Forgotten: Cambodia's Lost Rock and Roll examines and unravels Cambodia's tragic past, culminating in the genocidal Khmer Rouge's dismantling of the society and murder of 2,000,000 of its citizens.
